comment: That was very well presented and explained. I would like to add an observation. One might argue that a deep fake might do the exact presentation and people could not spot any difference. So, the real person and the deep fake, from an information point of view, only differ in “romanticism” of a true person vs a software. But this is not true. If I tell you that a presentation is maybe real maybe fake, it will change your experience and, eventually, the reality. Keeping experiencing something that’s maybe real maybe fake is a fast path to psychic problems, if you have to rely on what you watch, listen to etc…Let’s think about it.
